method: Parse all closed DOMEX lanes from SWARM-LANES.md and archive. Group by frontier to form campaigns. Classify wave positions (1=exploration, 2=hardening, 3+=resolution). Compare outcomes by wave count: resolution rate, lesson yield, EAD compliance. Identify dominant intent-type sequences (wave templates).

dominant_templates.template_str: exploration -> exploration -> exploration -> exploration -> exploration -> hardening -> exploration -> exploration -> exploration -> exploration -> exploration -> exploration -> hardening -> exploration -> exploration
exploration -> exploration -> exploration -> exploration -> exploration -> exploration -> exploration -> exploration
exploration -> hardening -> hardening -> hardening -> exploration -> exploration -> exploration
exploration -> hardening -> exploration -> exploration -> hardening -> hardening
unknown -> exploration -> closure -> exploration -> exploration -> exploration
